titles.text: クラッシュ・バンディクー リンゴバズーカでおおあばれ!
Crash Bandicoot: Ringo Bazooka de Oobare!
Crash Bandicoot: Ringo Bazooka de Oobare!

descriptions.text: Crash Bandicoot Blast! (or just Crash Blast) is a game exclusive to the GameCube version of Crash Bandicoot: The Wrath of Cortex released in 2002. It was developed by Vicarious Visions. To access it, the player must connect a Game Boy Advance to a GameCube with The Wrath of Cortex in it.
